title: Borer│鑽地器
description: Can be crafted into a Borer, which can instantly destroy any block. This provides a way to break bedrock without having to exploit a bug.│可以合成出鑽地器，它可以立即摧毀任何方塊。這提供了一種無需利用漏洞即可破壞基岩的方法。
body:
# Introduce│介紹
1. This data pack adds a new item: Borer. When you hold it and press the attack button on a block, the block will be destroyed immediately and the dropped items (if any) will be generated, no matter what the block is, and the Borer will be consumed.│本資料包加入了一個新的物品：鑽地器，拿著它對方塊按下攻擊鍵之後，該方塊就會被立刻破壞並且會產生掉落物（如有），無論那是甚麼方塊，同時鑽地器會被消耗掉。
2. Borer can be crafted using a crafting table. It can also be obtained using the command: ```/loot give @s loot borer:borer```│可以透過合成台合成出鑽地器。亦可使用該指令獲取：```/loot give @s loot borer:borer```

**※You can check the specific craft recipe in "Gallery"│你可以在"Gallery"中查看具體合成配方**
# Usage example video│使用示例影片
